• Snake & Ladder — Battle snakes and compete against other players in the rainforest!

title: Screwdom
notes:
New Event: Puzzle Pieces. Complete levels and collect puzzle pieces to earn special rewards.
New Seasonal: Summer Pass. Enjoy a sunny adventure packed with exclusive rewards.
Bug fixes and performance improvements.

title: Foundation: Galactic Frontier
notes:
1. Added Champion-exclusive weapons for "Fist of Luminism - Aliya" and "Warden - Eva Von Trier". These weapons will be available on servers that have been open for at least 27 weeks.
2. Improved the Duel Day experience for the Commerce Guild Duel event. Attacking a War Prism will now automatically remove the Interstellar Shelter status.
3. Optimized the descriptions for Champion Weapon Fragments, which now include the weapon's compatible Champion role and Style.

Bug fixes and game experience optimization

title: Art Of War 3:RTS Strategy Game
notes:
Bugs fixed:
- Re-entry after launching the game in some scenarios
- Game freezes when loading effects in battle
- Incorrect display of resources after logging in
- Incorrect progress for hero extermination contracts
- Building sounds in the replay when paused
title_kr: Art Of War 3: PvP RTS 전쟁 전략 게임

title: Family Farm Seaside®
notes:
New Features & Improvements:

- Decoration System: The Creativity Catalyst is now available! Earn Creativity points and embark on a brand-new growth journey.
- Cloud Aquarium: Fish caught via the Fishing Zeppelin can now be placed in the Cloud Aquarium. They'll thank you with Creativity points and beautiful pearls!
- Sweetlings: Claim your very own Sweetling companion! Grow your Affinity with it, and it will be a loyal friend throughout your adventures!
